canvas.previewHint: Thumbnail preview · double-click the file or use Open in tab for full view

files.empty: No files yet. Send a prompt to have the agent generate a design — files will show up here.

newDesignDialog.title: New design
newDesignDialog.subtitle: Optionally choose a local folder to sync your design files.

workspace.label: Folder
workspace.rebindDescription: This design already has a workspace folder. Choose how to proceed:

empty.title: Design with AI
empty.body: Pick a starter on the left, or describe what you want to design. The result renders here in a sandboxed preview.

error.title: Generation failed
error.body: Something went wrong while generating your design.
error.brokenJsx: This design has a syntax error, likely an incomplete early save. Regenerate or edit to fix.
error.undefinedRef: The design references an undefined variable or component. Likely a mid-run abort — try regenerating.

preview.clickToComment: Click any element in the preview to leave an inline comment.

tweaks.title: Tweaks
tweaks.emptyHint: The agent hasn't declared an EDITMODE block yet. Future generations will expose design tokens here.

chat.emptyHint: 스타터 프롬프트나 직접 작성한 아이디어로 시작하세요.
chat.placeholderRich: 디자인을 설명하세요… 예: '핀테크 스타트업을 위한 피치덱'

sidebar.designSystemHint: Link a repo to extract colors, typography, spacing, and other styling cues for future generations.
sidebar.startHint: Start with a brief, then add files, a URL, or a local repo to ground the result.

empty.title: What should we design?
empty.subtitle: Describe your idea below — or start from one of these.

comments.title: Comment mode
comments.body: Inline comments on the canvas arrive in v0.2.1. You'll be able to click any element in the preview to leave a note or an edit instruction.

imageGen.tabHint: 디자인 에이전트가 hero, poster, background bitmap 생성을 위해 이미지 모델(예: gpt-image-2)을 호출하게 합니다. 인증 정보는 로컬에만 남습니다.
imageGen.title: 이미지 생성 assist
imageGen.hint: 켜면 agent가 실행 중 generate_image_asset을 호출할 수 있습니다.

chatgptLogin.title: Sign in with ChatGPT subscription
chatgptLogin.description: Use your ChatGPT Plus / Pro / Team plan quota to call Codex models (gpt-5.3-codex and friends) — no API key needed.
chatgptLogin.inProgress: Browser opened. Complete the authorization and we'll return automatically…
chatgptLogin.unsupportedCountryRegion: ChatGPT subscription login is not available for this account, country, region, or territory.

providers.empty: 아직 설정된 provider가 없습니다. 생성을 시작하려면 하나를 추가하세요.

custom.title: Custom endpoint 추가
custom.name: Label
custom.compatibilityHintBody: 일부 coding plan, relay service, OpenAI-compatible gateway는 Claude Code, openclaw, Hermes 같은 특정 client만 허용할 수 있습니다. API 형태가 호환되어도 Open CoDesign은 앱 allowlist에 의해 차단될 수 있습니다.

import.claudeCodeOAuthBody: Pro/Max subscription은 Claude Code client 자체를 통해서만 사용할 수 있습니다. Third-party app은 subscription quota를 재사용할 수 없습니다. 여기서 사용하려면 Anthropic Console에서 API 키를 생성하세요(같은 계정, token 단위 과금).
import.claudeCodeHasKeyBody: {{source}}에서 {{baseUrl}} gateway용 키를 찾았습니다 — 가져오기를 눌러 사용하세요.
import.claudeCodeLocalProxyBody: {{baseUrl}}의 local proxy처럼 보입니다. Claude Code Proxy 같은 도구를 통해 OAuth subscription을 재사용하는 일반적인 설정입니다.
import.claudeCodeRemoteGatewayBody: {{baseUrl}} gateway에 Claude Code config의 API 키가 없습니다. gateway를 가져온 뒤 설정에서 키를 붙여넣으세요.
import.oauthErrorToast: Claude Code subscription은 third-party app과 공유할 수 없습니다. Anthropic Console에서 API 키를 생성하세요.
import.geminiNoKey: Gemini CLI config를 찾았지만 ~/.gemini/.env 또는 ~/.env에 API 키가 없습니다. Gemini를 쓰려면 키를 직접 붙여넣으세요.
import.geminiBlocked: Google Vertex AI project는 아직 지원하지 않습니다 — Gemini를 쓰려면 Gemini Developer API 키(AIzaSy…로 시작)를 붙여넣으세요.
import.opencodeBlocked: OpenCode config를 찾았지만 가져올 수 있는 항목이 없습니다. 위 warning을 확인하고 auth.json을 수정한 뒤 다시 시도하세요.
import.claudeCodeImportedActivated: Claude Code를 가져오고 활성 모델 provider로 설정했습니다
import.claudeCodeShellEnvHint: 또는 shell에서 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY를 export하고 Terminal에서 다시 실행하세요 — 자동으로 감지합니다.

toast.missingModel: Provider has no default model — add one first.

cliProxyApi.presetDescription: Claude/Codex/Gemini OAuth subscription을 감싸는 local proxy
cliProxyApi.apiKeyOptional: CPA config.yaml에 `api-keys`를 설정한 경우에만 API 키가 필요합니다
cliProxyApi.thinkingHint: 팁: 모델 이름에 `(high)` / `(xhigh)` / `(8192)`를 붙여 thinking budget을 제어하세요

cpaDetection.title: 이 컴퓨터에서 CLIProxyAPI가 감지되었습니다
cpaDetection.body: 가져오면 OAuth 인증된 Claude / Codex / Gemini 계정을 provider로 사용할 수 있습니다.

storage.restartHint: open-codesign이 config, logs, local design data를 저장할 위치를 선택하세요. 변경 사항은 영구 저장되며 앱 재시작 후 적용됩니다.
storage.locationSavedToast: 저장 위치가 저장되었습니다. 적용하려면 앱을 재시작하세요.
storage.onboardingHint: 다음 실행 때 onboarding wizard가 다시 나오도록 setup flag를 지웁니다.
storage.onboardingResetToast: Onboarding이 초기화되었습니다. 설정을 다시 실행하려면 앱을 재시작하세요.
storage.diagnosticsHint: 로그 폴더를 열어 로그를 확인하거나 bug report용 redacted bundle을 내보내세요.

diagnostics.title: 진단
diagnostics.description: 최근 오류를 확인하세요. 전체 context를 첨부해 bug를 report할 수 있습니다.
diagnostics.showTransient: 재시도 후 성공한 transient 오류 표시
diagnostics.dbUnavailable: 진단 저장소를 사용할 수 없습니다. 오류는 main.log에 계속 기록되지만 앱 재시작 전까지 여기에 표시되지 않습니다. 디스크 공간과 권한을 확인하세요.
diagnostics.inMemoryFallback: 인메모리 기록을 표시 중입니다 — DB를 사용할 수 없어 재시작 후 유지되지 않습니다.

advanced.updateChannelHint: Stable: 검증된 릴리스. Beta: 조기 접근(버그가 있을 수 있음).
advanced.checkForUpdatesOnStartupHint: 앱 실행 30초 후 새 릴리스를 자동 확인합니다.
advanced.timeoutHint: 생성 요청을 중단하기 전까지 기다릴 초 단위 시간입니다.

welcome.title: 어떤 모델로든 디자인하세요.
welcome.subtitle: 디자인 생성에 사용할 방식을 선택하세요. 나중에 설정에서 바꿀 수 있습니다.
welcome.tryFreeSubtitle: OpenRouter 무료 티어 — OpenRouter 키를 붙여넣은 뒤 openrouter/free로 시작하거나 원하는 모델 ID를 입력하세요.
welcome.useKeySubtitle: Anthropic, OpenAI, OpenRouter를 지원합니다. 키 접두사로 자동 감지합니다.
welcome.useOllamaSubtitle: API 비용 없이 100% 로컬에서 실행합니다. Ollama 설치 및 실행이 필요합니다.
welcome.useOllamaDetected: Ollama 감지됨 — 로컬에서 {{count}}개 모델 사용 가능.
welcome.useOllamaNotRunning: localhost:11434에서 Ollama를 찾지 못했습니다. 설치하거나 실행한 뒤 다시 시도하세요.

paste.title: API 키 붙여넣기
paste.description: provider를 자동 감지합니다. 계속하기 전에 테스트를 눌러 키와 엔드포인트를 확인하세요. 키는 로컬 ~/.config/open-codesign/config.toml 파일(0600 권한)에 저장됩니다.
paste.statusIdle: 위에 키를 붙여넣으세요 — 접두사로 provider를 자동 감지합니다.

errors.401: API 키가 유효하지 않거나 권한이 없습니다. provider 대시보드에서 확인하세요.
errors.402: 계정 크레딧이 없습니다. 충전 후 다시 시도하세요.
errors.429: 요청 한도에 도달했습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도하세요.
errors.network: Base URL에 연결할 수 없습니다. 도메인/포트/네트워크를 확인하세요.
errors.unsupported: 인식할 수 없는 키 접두사입니다. 지원: sk-ant- (Anthropic), sk- (OpenAI), sk-or- (OpenRouter).
errors.notSupportedProvider: {{provider}}는 v0.1에서 지원하지 않습니다. Anthropic, OpenAI, OpenRouter를 사용하세요.
errors.rendererDisconnected: renderer가 main process에 연결되어 있지 않습니다.
errors.detectIpc: provider 감지 실패(main process 연결 불가): {{message}}. 앱을 재시작한 뒤 다시 시도하세요.
errors.detectNetwork: provider 감지 실패(네트워크 오류): {{message}}. 연결을 확인하고 다시 시도하세요.

advanced.title: 고급 — custom base URL
advanced.description: provider의 기본 endpoint를 덮어씁니다. relay 서비스나 self-hosted proxy에 유용합니다. 공식 endpoint를 쓰려면 비워 두세요.

preset.label: Preset
preset.hint: 무엇을 고를지 모르겠다면 공식 endpoint는 OpenAI Official을, relay는 이름에 맞는 항목을 선택하세요.

connectionTest.idleHint: 계속하기 전에 테스트를 실행해 키와 연결을 확인하세요.

errors.401: API 키가 유효하지 않거나 권한이 없습니다.
errors.404: Base URL path가 잘못되었습니다. /v1 suffix를 추가해 보세요. 예: https://your-host/v1
errors.ECONNREFUSED: Base URL에 연결할 수 없습니다. 도메인/포트/네트워크를 확인하세요.
errors.IPC_BAD_INPUT: 연결 테스트에 잘못된 입력이 전달되었습니다. provider / API 키 / Base URL 필드를 확인하세요.

choose.title: 기본 모델 선택
choose.description: 추천값으로 시작하거나 provider별 모델 ID를 직접 입력하세요. 나중에 디자인마다 전환할 수 있습니다.
choose.primaryHintFree: 무료 경로는 openrouter/free로 시작하지만 원하는 OpenRouter 모델 ID를 입력할 수 있습니다.
choose.fastHintFree: 최저 비용을 원하면 openrouter/free를 유지하거나 더 빠른 custom 선택지로 바꾸세요.
choose.costNote: 예상 비용은 provider, 선택 모델, 프롬프트 길이에 따라 달라집니다.
choose.costNoteFree: OpenRouter 무료 routing availability는 바뀔 수 있습니다. 무료 route가 없으면 다른 모델 ID를 입력하세요.

notifications.generationFailedBaseUrlUpdated: Base URL updated. Try the request again.
notifications.generationFailedFixUnavailableDescriptio: This app version can't apply the fix automatically. Please edit the Base URL manually in Settings.
notifications.commentNeedsSnapshot: Generate a design first before leaving a comment

inlineComment.title: Comment on
inlineComment.description: Clicked elements stay selected in the canvas. Describe the visual or content change you want, and open-codesign will rewrite the artifact around that target.
inlineComment.placeholder: Make this section more compact, sharpen the headline, and align it with the linked design system…

commentBubble.title: Comment on
commentBubble.placeholder: Describe the change, or leave a note for yourself…

commentsTab.empty: Click any element in the preview while comment mode is on to leave a note or an edit instruction.

panel.title: Comments
panel.empty: No comments yet. Click any element on the canvas to leave one.

scope.tooltip: Whether the change is scoped to this element or the whole design

text.font-bigger: increase font size on this element
text.font-smaller: decrease font size on this element

disabledReason.enterApiKeyToValidate: Enter an API key to validate
disabledReason.enterKeyToTest: Paste an API key to test the connection
disabledReason.unsupportedKeyForTest: Unsupported key format — can't test this key
disabledReason.providerDetectIpcForTest: Provider detection failed (IPC) — can't test this key
disabledReason.providerDetectNetworkForTest: Provider detection failed (network) — can't test this key
disabledReason.validateKeyToContinue: Validate your API key to continue
disabledReason.ollamaComingSoon: Ollama integration is coming in v0.2

errorBoundary.body: The rest of the app is still running. Reload this view, or copy the stack to file a bug.

errors.providerAuthMissing: No API key configured. Open Settings to add one.
errors.ipcBadInput: Invalid input passed to the main process.
errors.exporterNotReady: Exporter is still loading. Try again in a moment.
errors.rendererDisconnected: Renderer is not connected to the main process.
errors.providerMissingKey: The active provider "{{provider}}" has no API key. Open Settings to add one.

view.title: Designs
view.subtitle: All your saved designs. Switch, rename, duplicate, or delete.
view.empty: No designs yet — create your first one to get started.

delete.title: Delete this design?
delete.body: "{{name}}" and all of its history will be removed from the designs list. This cannot be undone in v0.

notifications.createFailed: Could not create a new design
notifications.switchBlockedGenerating: Wait for generation to finish before switching
notifications.busyGenerating: Wait for the current generation to finish, then try again
notifications.deleted: Design moved out of the active list
notifications.deleteBlockedGenerating: Wait for generation to finish before deleting
notifications.saveFailed: Could not save the latest changes
notifications.snapshotSkippedBody: The agent's JSX is truncated (missing ReactDOM.createRoot or unbalanced braces). Previous good version preserved. Send the prompt again to retry.

diagnostics.title: Connection failed

cause.missingV1: Base URL path is likely missing the /v1 suffix.
cause.hostUnreachable: Cannot reach host — check domain, port, or VPN.
cause.timedOut: Request timed out — check firewall or VPN.
cause.corsError: CORS error (should not happen in main process). This is a bug.
cause.sslError: SSL / certificate error (self-signed cert on relay?).
cause.gatewayIncompatible: The gateway accepted the connection but does not implement this provider's API. Try switching wire (e.g. openai-chat).
cause.openaiResponsesMisconfigured: The endpoint rejected the request shape. The wire may be wrong — try switching to openai-chat.
cause.relayStreamingBug: The gateway may mishandle OpenAI Responses API SSE events (older sub2api / claude2api / anyrouter builds cut the stream short).
cause.serverError: Upstream server error. May be transient — try again.
cause.unknown: Unknown error — check the full log for details.

fix.relayStreamingBug: Upgrade the relay, switch wire to openai-chat, or use api.openai.com directly

diagnostics.gatewayAllowlistHintTitle: This endpoint may restrict which apps can connect
diagnostics.gatewayAllowlistHintBody: Some coding plans and protocol-conversion gateways keep an app allowlist. Even when they advertise an OpenAI-compatible API, they may still reject Open CoDesign unless this app is explicitly allowed.

report.title: Report a bug

include.promptHint: Includes the text of prompts you submitted during the session.
include.pathsHint: Includes local file paths (can reveal your username / directory structure).
include.timelineHint: 60-second activity log — actions only, no content.

report.disclaimer: Nothing is uploaded automatically. The diagnostic bundle is saved to your Downloads folder; attach it to the GitHub issue manually.

error.generic: Couldn't open the issue. Check the log folder for details.

report.openFailedCopyHint: Copy the issue URL and open it manually.
report.clipboardFailedHint: The bundle is on disk — open it manually and paste the summary there.

meditationApp.title: Calm Spaces meditation app
meditationApp.description: Mobile prototype with phone frame, soft palette, interactive nav.
meditationApp.prompt: Design a mobile app prototype for a meditation app called Calm Spaces. Show a phone frame containing a home screen with a meditation list, play button, and progress tracker. Use serene typography, soft greens and blues, and lots of white space.

caseStudy.title: Client case study one-pager
caseStudy.description: Dark theme one-page PDF-ready layout with hero metrics.
caseStudy.prompt: Create a one-page client case study. The client increased qualified leads 40% using our platform. Include before/after metrics, a CEO quote, and a logo placeholder. Clean, minimal, dark theme.

pitchDeck.title: B2B SaaS pitch deck
pitchDeck.description: 8-12 slides for a healthcare-targeted SaaS pitch.
pitchDeck.prompt: Design a pitch deck for a B2B SaaS company targeting mid-market healthcare. 8 to 10 slides covering problem, market, product, traction, team, and ask.

marketingLanding.title: Marketing landing page
marketingLanding.description: Hero + features + CTA, tunable accent color.
marketingLanding.prompt: Design a modern marketing landing page for an AI productivity tool. Include a hero section, three feature cards, social proof, and a call to action. Use a warm neutral palette.

examples.title: Examples
examples.subtitle: Hand-picked starting points. Hover to preview, then drop the prompt into the composer.
examples.promptUsedToast: Prompt loaded — edit and send when ready.

emptyState.heading: What would you like to design?
emptyState.subline: Describe your idea in the chat, or pick a template to get started.

starterDesc.landing: Hero + feature cards + social proof + CTA
starterDesc.dashboard: Line chart + bars + table, dark theme

starterPrompts.landing: Build a landing page for an AI startup. Hero with a strong tagline, 3 feature cards, social proof section, CTA. Editorial typography, generous whitespace.
starterPrompts.pitch: Generate the first 3 slides of a pitch deck for a fintech startup: title slide, problem, solution. 16:9 format, navy palette, one orange accent.
starterPrompts.mobile: Design a 3-screen mobile app onboarding flow inside a phone frame: welcome, permissions, first action. Soft mint palette.
starterPrompts.dashboard: Build an analytics dashboard with: MRR trend line chart, pipeline stacked bars, top accounts table, and forecast gauge. Dark theme, teal + amber accents, plausible mock data.
starterPrompts.email: Design a transactional welcome email for a SaaS product. Single column, 600px wide, table-based. Logo header, greeting, 3 onboarding steps, CTA button, footer.
starterPrompts.portfolio: Design a photographer portfolio with masonry image grid using CSS gradient placeholders. Dark background, category filter pills, hover overlay with title and camera settings.
starterPrompts.casestudy: Create a one-page customer case study for a B2B fintech. Hero with client name, three large metrics with deltas, a CFO pull quote, a three-step 'How we did it' section, and a logo strip. Dark theme, serif headings, monospace numerals.
starterPrompts.animation: Build a showcase page with six organic CSS loading animations. Each in its own card: blob morph, leaf sway, ink drop, breathing circle, soft pulse, ribbon weave. Warm cream background, muted pastels, pure CSS/SVG only.

recent.title: Recent
recent.empty: Nothing here yet — start a new design to see it pinned at the top.

your.title: Your designs
your.empty: No designs saved yet. Click "New design" to create your first one.

examples.title: Examples
examples.comingSoon: A curated gallery of starter prompts is on the way.

designSystems.title: Design systems
designSystems.comingSoon: Reusable brand systems and templates are on the way.

create.title: Start a new design
create.subtitle: Pick a type so we can tailor the first prompt.

typeDescriptions.prototype: Interactive UI mockups with a phone or browser frame.
typeDescriptions.slideDeck: A multi-slide deck for talks, pitches, or summaries.
typeDescriptions.template: Start from one of the bundled starter prompts.
typeDescriptions.other: A blank canvas — describe anything else you have in mind.

fields.name: Project name
fields.fidelityWireframeHint: Greyscale blocks, no imagery — quick exploration.
fields.fidelityComingSoon: Wireframe vs. high-fidelity selection ships in a follow-up.
fields.speakerNotesHint: Adds a notes section under each slide for delivery cues.
fields.templateHint: Choose a starter — the first prompt will be pre-filled.

create.disabledHint: Add a project name to continue.

help.share: Designs stay on this device. Sharing happens through bundle export — no cloud account needed.
help.templates: More starters arrive in a follow-up; this list will keep growing.

err.IPC_BAD_INPUT: The request contained invalid input. Please try again.
err.IPC_DB_ERROR: A local database error occurred. Restarting the app may help.
err.IPC_NOT_FOUND: The requested item was not found.
err.PROVIDER_AUTH_MISSING: No API key found for this provider. Please add your key in Settings.
err.PROVIDER_KEY_MISSING: No API key is stored for this provider. Add one in Settings.
err.PROVIDER_ACTIVE_MISSING_KEY: The active provider has no API key. Open Settings to add one.
err.PROVIDER_NOT_SUPPORTED: This provider is not supported. Check your provider configuration.
err.PROVIDER_MODEL_UNKNOWN: The selected model is not available for this provider.
err.PROVIDER_BASE_URL_MISSING: A base URL is required for this provider. Configure it in Settings.
err.PROVIDER_ERROR: The provider returned an error. Check your API key and try again.
err.PROVIDER_HTTP_4XX: The provider rejected the request. Verify your API key and billing.
err.PROVIDER_UPSTREAM_ERROR: The provider returned an unexpected error. Details are in the log.
err.PROVIDER_GATEWAY_INCOMPATIBLE: Your gateway returned 'not implemented' for the Messages API. Try switching wire to openai-chat in Settings, or use a gateway that supports the Anthropic Messages API.
err.PROVIDER_RETRY_EXHAUSTED: The provider failed after several retries. Check your connection and try again.
err.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_ONLY: Your Claude Code login uses an Anthropic subscription (Pro/Max). Third-party apps cannot reuse the subscription quota — generate an API key at console.anthropic.com and use it here.
err.CODEX_TOKEN_PARSE_FAILED: Local ChatGPT login is corrupted. Please re-login in Settings.
err.CODEX_TOKEN_NOT_LOGGED_IN: ChatGPT subscription is not signed in. Please log in via Settings.
err.INPUT_EMPTY_HTML: Existing HTML is required for this operation.
err.INPUT_UNSUPPORTED_MODE: This generation mode is not supported.
err.GENERATION_TIMEOUT: Generation timed out. Try a shorter prompt or increase the timeout in Settings.
err.CONFIG_READ_FAILED: Failed to read configuration file. Check file permissions.
err.CONFIG_PARSE_FAILED: Configuration file could not be parsed. It may be corrupt.
err.CONFIG_SCHEMA_INVALID: Configuration file has an unrecognised format. Please reconfigure.
err.CONFIG_NOT_LOADED: Configuration has not been loaded yet. Please restart the app.
err.CONFIG_MISSING: No configuration found. Complete onboarding to get started.
err.SNAPSHOTS_UNAVAILABLE: The local design database is unavailable. Restarting the app may help.
err.BOOT_ORDER: An internal startup error occurred. Please restart the app.
err.STORAGE_SETTINGS_READ_FAILED: Failed to read storage location settings.
err.STORAGE_SETTINGS_PARSE_FAILED: Storage location settings could not be parsed.
err.STORAGE_SETTINGS_INVALID: Storage location settings contain invalid data.
err.KEYCHAIN_UNAVAILABLE: OS keychain (secure storage) is not available. API keys cannot be stored.
err.KEYCHAIN_EMPTY_INPUT: Cannot encrypt or decrypt an empty value.
err.ATTACHMENT_TOO_LARGE: One or more attachments exceed the size limit.
err.ATTACHMENT_READ_FAILED: Failed to read an attachment file. Check that the file still exists.
err.REFERENCE_URL_TOO_LARGE: The reference URL content is too large to include.
err.REFERENCE_URL_FETCH_FAILED: Could not fetch the reference URL. Check the URL and your internet connection.
err.REFERENCE_URL_FETCH_TIMEOUT: Fetching the reference URL timed out. Try again or use a different URL.
err.REFERENCE_URL_UNSUPPORTED: This type of reference URL is not supported.
err.PREFERENCES_READ_FAIL: Failed to read preferences. Default settings will be used.
err.PREFERENCES_INVALID_TIMEOUT: The generation timeout value is invalid.
err.SKILL_LOAD_FAILED: One or more skills failed to load. Check your skill files for errors.
err.EXPORTER_NO_CHROME: Chrome or Chromium was not found. Install it to enable PDF export.
err.EXPORTER_PDF_FAILED: PDF export failed. Ensure Chrome is installed and try again.
err.EXPORTER_ZIP_UNSAFE_PATH: Export was blocked: an asset path would escape the ZIP archive.
err.OPEN_PATH_FAILED: Could not open the requested folder or file.
err.RENDERER_ERROR: An error occurred in the renderer. Details are in the log.
